sourceTitle: Macro-level guidance: University-wide principles and policy
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Submitting text generated by technology/artificial intelligence as their own, without written permission from their department is considered misconduct under the offences of third-party involvement or text manipulation, if it provides undue advantage or interferes with assessment of the student's own understanding.
evidenceLocator: Macro-level > Guidance on academic integrity, attribution, detection
